steps.title: Contrast robot reactions
steps.content: The sentence contrasts a comforting semblance of humanity with the unsettling effect of robots that seem too human. The blank should name the positive feeling the design was supposed to create.

steps.title: Name the calming reaction
steps.content: B is neutral, C is another negative reaction, and D means feeling justified, which is unrelated. The word for feeling comforted fits the contrast with being unsettled. The answer is A.
